stemHtml: Cherokee XY-ABC receives the following instruction: "X-BC, climb straight ahead until 2500 feet before turning right, wind 270 degrees 6 knots, cleared for take-off". What is the correct read back?

options.a: Straight ahead, 2500 feet right turn, wind west 6 knots, cleared for take-off, X-BC.
options.b: Straight ahead, at 2500 feet right turn, cleared for take-off, X-BC.
